mapper.select: SELECT oi.PRODUCT_ID, oi.PRODUCT_NAME, oi.OPTION_COLOR, oi.OPTION_SIZE, oi.QTY, oi.TOTAL_PRICE, f.FILE_URL AS THUMBNAIL_URL FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM oi LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REF_ID, FILE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REF_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM TB_FILE WHERE REF_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' ) f ON f.REF_ID = oi.PRODUCT_ID AND f.RN = 1 WHERE oi.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID
